name: blackwood
title: Blackwood
description: Log notes, clip URLs, ingest images, record voice memos, and ask questions against your Blackwood daily notes.
author: csweichel

commands.name: log-note
commands.title: Log Note
commands.subtitle: Blackwood
commands.description: Add a text note to today's daily note.

commands.name: clip-url
commands.title: Clip URL
commands.subtitle: Blackwood
commands.description: Clip a URL from the clipboard into today's daily note.

commands.name: ask-question
commands.title: Ask Question
commands.subtitle: Blackwood
commands.description: Ask a question against your notes using RAG.

commands.name: ingest-image
commands.title: Ingest Image
commands.subtitle: Blackwood
commands.description: Add an image to today's daily note.

commands.name: voice-record
commands.title: Voice Record
commands.subtitle: Blackwood
commands.description: Record a voice memo and add it to today's daily note.

preferences.name: serverUrl
preferences.title: Server URL
preferences.description: The base URL of your Blackwood server (e.g. https://blackwood.example.com).
